response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff-level engineer with a strong background in high-scale distributed systems, testing frameworks, and recent AI-agent infrastructure. While he possesses excellent software craftsmanship and has worked at scale (e.g., millions of requests/second), his resume lacks direct experience building the core domain requirements for this role: enterprise-scale growth, A/B testing, and feature-flagging experimentation platforms.
strengths: Extensive experience with high-scale distributed systems, having handled millions of HTTP requests per second using microservices.
Strong background in software craftsmanship, TDD, and building testing frameworks, which translates well to experimentation quality.
Recent hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) code generators.
concerns: Lacks explicit experience building foundational growth, telemetry, or A/B experimentation platforms.
No demonstrated background in statistical methods, experimental analysis, or rollout-risk management.
Most recent roles lean heavily toward full-stack product development rather than foundational platform infrastructure.
